text: In the first image, I feel the presence of others, their backs turned like guardians of unseen knowledge. I am quietly curious, sensing anticipation in the air, yet distant from their inner worlds. In the second image, the vivid colors and abstract displays invoke intellectual excitement. Here, I am struck by the intersection of knowledge and uncertainty—how little can obscure our understanding, how much our focus can drift. I feel reflective, inspired by both the clarity and the confusion that shape my perception.
